title: Gaveno Cavailia Super Soft Plain Dyed Diamond Fitted Sheet [ King - Sky Blue ]
features: ARRAY OF SIZES AND STYLES: Whatever your bed size, you can find the perfect fit from among our new diamond range fitted sheet

SOFT AND SMOOTH MATERIAL: The exquisite poly-cotton blend of these sumptuous sheets slide smoothly over your skin as you shift in your slumber, allowing you to get the rest you deserve night after night

STAY WARM AND COSY: These expertly manufactured bed sheets are designed to help keep you resting comfortably at the ideal temperature throughout the night by keeping heat close to your skin while avoiding overheating
EASY WASH MATERIAL: It could not be simpler to care for these easy-care 50% cotton, 50% polyester bed sheets in the convenience of your own home

SUIT YOUR STYLE: With a fabulous array of exciting colours to choose from, you can find the perfect fit to enhance and complement your bedroom set when you treat yourself to a brand-new bedsheet from the new diamond range
description: Product Description NEW DIAMOND PLAIN FITTED SHEET ★ A simple way to give your bedroom a completely new look with our Contemporary Living Up to Date Style. ★ Smooth, Comfortable and highly durable. Comfortable and super soft linen for your bedroom. ★ Sumptuous living: a step towards luxury, delicacy and your desired softness. ★ Settle down to a restful and peaceful night’s sleep underneath this soft and comfortable fitted sheet, adorned with this adorable design. ★ An attractive and modern addition to your bedroom furnishings. ★ This durable fitted sheet is designed with luxury and comfort in mind and are a fantastic way to breath new life into your tired bedroom décor. ★ Refresh your bedding, revamp your space. These fitted sheet are a dreamy addition for any room bold, soft, luxurious, and effortless to clean. ★ Material Composition: 50% Cotton, 50% Polyester ★ Sizes: Single: 193 cm x 91 cm x 25 cm Double: 193 cm x 137 cm x 25 cm King: 203 cm x 152 cm x 25 cm Super King: 203 cm x 182 cm x 25 cm 4FT (Small Double): 122 x 190 x 25 cm Bunk Bed(BB): 193 Cm x 76 Cm ★ Includes: 1 x Fitted Sheet ★ Care Instructions: Machine Washable. Washable at 40 °C. Do not Dry clean. Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature. Iron at low temperature. Steam ironing may be a risk. ★ Brand: Gaveno Cavailia® Safety Warning Steam ironing may be a risk. Box Contains 1 Fitted Sheet See more

specifications_table.Product Care Instructions: Do not Dry Clean, Keep Away From Fire, Machine Wash, Machine Washable
